top_signals.title: ECB does not need to fight inflation with ‘same force’ as in 2022-23, Lagarde says
top_signals.summary: President of central bank signals there could be a modest increase in interest rates
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Lagarde Says Europe Is Getting More Resilient to Economic Shocks
top_signals.summary: Europe is becoming less vulnerable to outside shocks thanks to a better financial framework and progress on the green transition, Christine Lagarde said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, Welcome Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech At the State of Small Business Symposium hosted by the Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Fund That Tracks Founder-Led Companies
top_signals.summary: Michael Monaghan, partner and portfolio manager at Founder ETFS, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the Founders 100 ETF (ticker: FFF). (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: EU sets deadline of October for reduction in trade deficit with China
top_signals.summary: European commissioner Maroš Šefčovič demands action after meeting Chinese commerce minister Wang Wentao
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Justices rule that cellphone location histories are protected by the Fourth Amendment
top_signals.summary: Police must get a warrant to request geofence data involving individual cellphones, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled in what represents a victory for privacy advocates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Arkham launches ranking system for prediction market traders
top_signals.summary: The highest Elo-ranked trader, “GardenerCx,” has a win rate of 64.3% over 2,644 bets focused on up/down bitcoin markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: eClerx Recognized as a Representative Vendor in 2026 Gartner® Market Guide for Digital Shelf Analytics
top_signals.summary: eClerx Services Ltd (ECLERX.NS), a global leader in AI-powered analytics, digital operations, automation, and business process management, today announced that eClerx Market360 has been recognized as a Representative Vendor in the Gartner® Market Guide for Digital Shelf Analytics. This marks the second consecutive year that eClerx has been included in the report, following its recognition [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
